message: Update chat UI and disable join/leave logs  Comment out server-side emit and file writes for join/leave events to stop broadcasting and persisting system join/leave messages. Update client message class names in static/chat.js (use .msg .sent .rcvd) and replace old .user-message/.self-message usage. Revamp static/styles.css with new message bubble styles, layout tweaks for #chat, and rounded bubble handling for sent/received messages. Chat room history files updated with new entries (leyline/admin) and users.json added a new user
